task: Create a JSON policy document that allows read-only access to all objects in an S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'
solution_criteria: Must be valid IAM policy JSON with correct Version, Statement structure, Effect set to Allow, Action for S3 GetObject, and Resource pointing to the specific bucket with /* for all objects

task: Write a Python function that takes an AWS region string and returns the corresponding S3 endpoint URL (e.g., 'us-east-1' -> 'https://s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com')
solution_criteria: Function should handle standard AWS regions, return properly formatted HTTPS S3 endpoint URLs, and handle the special case of us-east-1 which can use both regional and legacy endpoints

task: Create a regex pattern that validates AWS ARN (Amazon Resource Name) format for Lambda functions
solution_criteria: Pattern must match the ARN structure: arn:aws:lambda:region:account-id:function:function-name, where region is alphanumeric with hyphens, account-id is 12 digits, and function-name follows AWS Lambda naming conventions
